description: HTML tables: border-collapse, border-spacing, colspan, rowspan, table-layout fixed, thead/tbody/tfoot
visual_assertions: The collapse table should show thin single-line borders between all cells
The separate table should show visible spacing/gaps between cells (border-spacing: 8px)
Table header rows should have a dark/colored background with white text
Even rows in the striped table should have a light gray background
The rowspan=2 cell 'North' should span two rows visually
The colspan=2 cell '$220k combined' should span two columns visually
The colspan=4 'Total: $1,310k' cell should span four columns
The table-layout fixed table should have the first column constrained to 50px
The tfoot row 'Grand Total' should appear at the bottom of the table with bold styling
